title: Hair Salon → Add Nail + Waxing Services (Houston)

differences.austin: Each nail technician must hold a Texas Nail Technology license issued by the Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation (TDLR). Minimum 600 hours of training required.
Each esthetics/waxing technician must hold a Texas Esthetician license (TDLR). Minimum 750 hours of training. Temporary certificates allowed during training.

differences.dallas: Your existing Cosmetology Salon permit covers hair services only.
differences.austin: Adding nail or esthetic services requires amending your Cosmetology Salon permit with TDLR to include the additional service categories. Each category has separate inspection requirements.

differences.dallas: Standard salon ventilation meets hair-only requirements.
differences.austin: Nail services require enhanced ventilation per Texas Administrative Code (chemical fumes from nail products). A ventilation inspection by the local fire marshal or building department may be required before adding nail stations.

differences.dallas: Hair salon services: sales tax applies to certain beauty services in Texas.
differences.austin: Nail and waxing services are also subject to Texas sales tax. No additional permit needed — update your existing Texas Sales Tax Permit to reflect the new service categories.
